admin_username.description: The username of the admin user for the Redshift Serverless namespace.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Redshift Serverless namespace.

db_name.description: The name of the database within the Redshift Serverless namespace.

default_iam_role_arn.description: The ARN of the default IAM role associated with the Redshift Serverless namespace.

iam_roles.description: A set of IAM role ARNs associated with the Redshift Serverless namespace.

id.description: The identifier for the Redshift Serverless namespace.

kms_key_id.description: The KMS key ID used for encryption within the Redshift Serverless namespace.

log_exports.description: A set of log types that are exported from the Redshift Serverless namespace.

namespace_id.description: The unique identifier for the namespace in Redshift Serverless.
